name: beefree-sdk-angular-nestjs-auth-example
description: Angular Email Builder (Beefree SDK) + NestJS Secure Authentication Example

scripts.dev: concurrently -n nest,vite -c red,cyan "cd backend && npx nest start --watch" "cd frontend && npx vite"
scripts.start: concurrently -n nest,vite -c red,cyan "cd backend && npx nest start --watch" "cd frontend && npx vite"
scripts.build: cd backend && npx nest build && cd ../frontend && npx vite build
scripts.type-check: cd frontend && npx tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit && cd ../backend && npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json --noEmit
scripts.test: yarn workspace frontend test && yarn workspace backend test
scripts.test:coverage: yarn workspace frontend test:coverage && yarn workspace backend test:coverage
